creator: robert@fledge.watson.org
text:
Many syscall man pages have an IMPLEMENTATION NOTES section to describe how
they are implemented.  mdoc(7) does not include this section name in the
acceptable sections list.  It should be added.

Fix: 

Add IMPLEMENTATION NOTES and optionally a description.
How-To-Repeat: 
man 2 write
man 7 mdoc
